title: Inventory NRV
subtitle: IAS 2 slow-moving and obsolete inventory assessment. Define age-based writedown bands and compute current net realizable value. Posting is deferred pending the backend runner.
posting_deferred_note: Note: NRV is memo-only in this partial. Write-down journal entries and reversal workflow ship with the follow-up backend runner.

active.heading: Active Policy
active.no_policy_description: Define an age-based writedown policy to compute NRV for slow-moving and obsolete inventory.

assessment.heading: Current Assessment
assessment.subheading: Per-item writedown based on age since last stock movement.
assessment.no_policy_note: Create an active NRV policy to compute an assessment.

modal.label: NEW POLICY
modal.title: Create NRV Policy
modal.hint: Bands use (min, max] semantics: minAgeDays exclusive, maxAgeDays inclusive (leave maxAgeDays blank for an open-ended catch-all band). Writedown percent applies to gross value at asOf.
modal.bands_hint: At least one band; up to 20. Sort ascending by minAgeDays. Overlapping bands are rejected by the backend.
modal.error_until_after_from: Active-until must be strictly after active-from.
modal.error_bands_required: At least one band is required.
modal.error_band_min_age: Band {{n}}: min age must be integer 0..10000.
modal.error_band_max_age: Band {{n}}: max age must be integer >= min age, or blank.
modal.error_band_percent: Band {{n}}: writedown percent must be 0..100 with up to 2 decimals.
modal.error_generic: Failed to create policy. Please try again.
